abilities.name: Campaign Bonus
abilities.effect: Increases the chance to find food and better quality food by 75% in food campaigns

abilities.name: Rogue Drop Rate Bonus
abilities.effect: Increases the drop rate for items in dungeons by an extra 0.5% per class level when evolved as Rogue

abilities.name: Acorn Collection (Token Upgrade)
abilities.effect: Finds 1 acorn per dungeon room, granting a drop rate bonus based on acorns found

pets.notes: Requires 25 Hot Stone and 100 God Power + 1 DRC completion to evolve. Total evolution growth: 900. Token upgrade added in version 4.45.1580 (August 7, 2025). Base total growth: 500.

abilities.name: Divinity Campaign Bonus
abilities.effect: Provides 100% boost to divinity campaign gains

abilities.name: Adventurer Campaign Bonus
abilities.effect: Adventurer-class Cupid receives an extra campaign bonus per class level

abilities.name: Couple Matching (Token Upgrade)
abilities.effect: Can create romantic couples between two pets daily. Each couple grants 30% + 2% per couple to all campaign bonuses, plus an extra 50% to divinity campaigns. Couples have 1% daily breakup chance, but become permanent after 365 days (married)

pets.notes: Requires 10 Feather and 100 Chocolate to evolve. Base total growth: 630. One of only 2 wind pets available until Fairy unlocks. Common choice as first Blacksmith token pet.

pets.howObtained: Use a Pet Token from Premium Shop

abilities.name: God Power Doubling
abilities.effect: Doubles all God Power earned from dungeon events (works when evolved or unevolved, in any class)

abilities.name: Rogue Drop Rate Bonus
abilities.effect: Increases the drop rate for items in dungeons by an extra 0.6% per class level when Rogue

pets.notes: Requires 500 Nevermelting Ice and 200 God Power to evolve. Base total growth: 1900. One of the strongest early-game pets for God Power farming. Relatively easy to evolve but has low base growth. Undine is a stronger Water Rogue in later dungeons, but Clam's bonus works in any class.

abilities.name: Mage Class Bonus
abilities.effect: When evolved as Mage, provides a campaign bonus

pets.notes: Evolution difficulty level 2(2) - requires less than 10,000 growth plus two additional evolution conditions. Mid-tier pet unlocked during Baal progression. No special dungeon or campaign abilities documented. Recommended for Mage specialization.

pets.howObtained: Use a Pet Token, then kill the Depth 2 boss of each dungeon (pet does not need to be in team)

abilities.name: Scare
abilities.effect: At the beginning of each round, attempts to reduce a random enemy's Attack and Defense by 50% (30% for bosses), increasing damage taken and targeting chance. Grants +9999 speed initiative to outspeed most enemies

abilities.name: Twin Scare (Class Level 20+)
abilities.effect: At Class Level 20, allows two separate scare attempts per action instead of one

abilities.name: Rogue Drop Rate Bonus
abilities.effect: Increases the drop rate for items in dungeons by an extra 0.65% per class level

pets.notes: Requires 750 iron bars to evolve. Base growth: 3750. Cannot attack or deal damage - only equip with Inferno or Ego Swords. Cannot use knives as equipment. Evolution requires clearing every D2 boss at least once (across all dungeons). Powerful early-game crowd control but scales poorly; ability becomes hindrance in late game compared to other Rogues like Undine.
